Our Products

Every packet made with love, dried by the sun — pure like your dadi's kitchen

Why Mandeshi Masala

The Masala
That Does It All

  • One masala blend for every sabji — alu, baingan, dal, bhindi, everything
  • Chillies naturally dried under open sunlight — zero artificial colour
  • Stone-ground traditionally to lock in all aroma and nutrients
  • Free from adulteration, preservatives and any synthetic flavours
  • Made in small fresh batches weekly for maximum freshness always
  • Sourced directly from Mandesh region — pure, traceable origin

Delivery & Ordering

🚚

Fresh masala at your doorstep — fast, safe and simple

🚚
Pan-India Delivery
We ship everywhere in India. Orders dispatched within 1–2 business days via trusted couriers.
📦
Safe Packaging
Air-tight, moisture-proof food-grade pouches and jars keep products fresh throughout transit.
💳
Easy Payment
Pay via UPI, PhonePe, Google Pay, Paytm, Bank Transfer, or Cash on Delivery in select areas.
🔄
Freshness Guarantee
Not satisfied? Contact us within 3 days of delivery for a replacement or full refund — no questions asked.
📱
WhatsApp Orders
Order on WhatsApp for bulk quantities, custom combos or wholesale. Quick response guaranteed.
🎁
Gift Packs
Beautiful hampers for Diwali, weddings and housewarmings. Custom message cards included free.

Our Story

🌿

From a small kitchen in Mhaswad to your home

Mandeshi Masala was born from a grandmother's recipe — passed down through generations in the Mandesh region of Maharashtra. When chemical-laden powders began replacing real flavours, we decided enough was enough.

Based in Warkute Mhaswad, Satara, we source only the finest red chillies, dry them under the open sky, and grind them with hand-selected whole spices. No factory. No preservatives. Just honest, homemade food made with love.

Every packet is made fresh in small batches — because food made with care tastes better, and food that is honest nourishes deeper.
